encounters.name: Vexamus
encounters.description: Professor Maxdormu conjures a lesson that recalls the story of Vexamus, introducing the elemental's arsenal of Arcane abilities as the narrative progresses. The professor's magic book summons [Arcane Orbs] that gravitate towards Vexamus and grant it more power if not intercepted.

abilities.name: Arcane Orbs
abilities.description: The Professor conjures enchanted orbs from the magic book that inflict 152535 Arcane damage within 3 yards of impact and begin to gravitate towards Vexamus.If an orb is absorbed by Vexamus, the elemental inflict 61175 Arcane damage to all players. If an orb is absorbed by a player, it will inflict 50987 Arcane damage to them.

abilities.name: Arcane Expulsion
abilities.description: Vexamus ejects a mass of arcane energy inflicting 228901 Arcane damage to players in front of it. In the NPC Abilities category. A spell from World of Warcraft: Dragonflight.

abilities.name: Mana Bombs
abilities.description: Vexamus infuses up to 3 players with explosive mana, inflicting 25423 Arcane damage every 1 sec for 4 sec. Upon expiration, the mana will detonate inflicting 50845 Arcane damage within 4 yards and leaving a pool of Corrupted Mana for 1 min.

abilities.name: Corrupted Mana
abilities.description: Corrupted Mana inflicts 91565 Arcane damage every 1 sec to players inside and reduces their movement speed by 30%. In the NPC Abilities category.

abilities.name: Oversurge
abilities.description: Increases damage taken from absorbing Arcane Orbs by 200% for 18 sec. In the NPC Abilities category. A spell from World of Warcraft: Dragonflight.

abilities.name: Arcane Fissure
abilities.description: Upon reaching 100 energy, Vexamus explodes with overwhelming power inflicting 81352 Arcane damage to all players and pushing them back. Fissures erupt multiple times at player locations, each inflicting 152535 Arcane damage within 4 yards.

abilities.name: Arcane Fissure
abilities.description: Upon reaching 100 energy, Vexamus explodes with overwhelming power inflicting 81352 Arcane damage to all players and pushing them back. A spell.

abilities.name: Radiant Focus
abilities.description: Your damaging spells and abilities have the chance to ignite your target with Radiant Focus for 15 sec. After dealing up to 18842 damage to the target, the focused energies ignite you with Radiance, granting between (35 * .5) to 35 of your highest Secondary stat based on damage dealt for 15 sec.

encounters.name: Overgrown Ancient
encounters.description: The Overgrown Ancient attempts to crush the tank with [Barkbreaker] and repeatedly forces waves of dormant lashers to grow with [Germinate].Upon reaching 100 energy, the Overgrown Ancient uses [Burst Forth] to awaken all dormant lashers that have not yet been killed, causing them to attack players.

abilities.name: Barkbreaker
abilities.description: The Overgrown Ancient stomps its target with crushing force, inflicting 244246 Physical damage and increasing Physical damage taken by 100% for 9 sec.

abilities.name: Germinate
abilities.description: The Overgrown Ancient forces dormant lasher seeds beneath all players' feet to sprout every 1 sec for 4 sec.Each emerging seed inflicts 127113 Physical damage to players within 4 yds and knocks them back, then leaves behind a dormant Hungry Lasher.

abilities.name: Burst Forth
abilities.description: Upon reaching 100 energy, the Overgrown Ancient releases its abundant life magic to awaken all dormant Lashers, inflicting 81352 Nature damage to all players as they burst free from the ground.

abilities.name: Healing Touch
abilities.description: Heal an ally for 393274. In the NPC Abilities category. A spell from World of Warcraft: Dragonflight. Always up to date with the latest patch.

abilities.name: Germinate
abilities.description: The Overgrown Ancient forces dormant lasher seeds beneath all players' feet to sprout every 1 sec for 4 sec.Each emerging seed inflicts 127113 Physical damage to players within 4 yds and knocks them back, then leaves behind a dormant Hungry Lasher.

abilities.name: Lasher Toxin
abilities.description: The Hungry Lasher's attacks have a chance to poison the target, inflicting 5085 Nature damage every 3 sec for 9 sec. This effect stacks. A spell.

abilities.name: Branch Out
abilities.description: The Overgrown Ancient throws one of its own branches at a location, inflicting 152535 Physical damage to players within 8 yds and knocking them back.The Ancient Branch then animates and attacks players.

abilities.name: Branch Out
abilities.description: The Overgrown Ancient throws one of its own branches at a location, inflicting 152535 Physical damage to players within 8 yds and knocking them back.The Ancient Branch then animates and attacks players.

abilities.name: Splinterbark

abilities.name: Abundance
abilities.description: Upon death, release a spark of life energy that bursts after 3.5 sec, healing allies and players within 8 yds for 655457, and removing all applications of Splinterbark.

abilities.name: Meerah's Jukebox
abilities.description: Set up a rickety jukebox featuring Meerah's greatest hit! In the Item Effects category. A spell from World of Warcraft: Battle for Azeroth. Always up to date.

encounters.name: Crawth
encounters.description: Nesting on the sporting grounds of the old academy, Crawth loudly and violently objects to those that would reclaim the space. Unbeknownst to the massive bird, the goals of the ancient arena still contain some of their original power...

abilities.name: Savage Peck
abilities.description: Crawth viciously pecks at her target, inflicting 228803 Physical damage instantly with an additional 35592 Physical damage every 1 sec for 10 sec.

abilities.name: Play Ball!
abilities.description: The goals of The Pitch activate, allowing players to score points in either the Goal of the Searing Blaze or the Goal of the Rushing Winds. A spell.

abilities.name: Firestorm
abilities.description: The goal erupts in flames, launching several motes of fire at the arena. Each mote inflicts 127113 Fire damage and stuns players for 3 sec within 5 yards of where it lands.The Firestorm also stuns Crawth and makes her take 75% increased damage for 12 sec and afflicts her with Blistering Fire.

abilities.name: Gale Force
abilities.description: Fierce winds rush out of the goal, knocking Crawth in the air and pushing players back and summoning Roving Cyclones.Each mote can be picked up to grant 45% Haste and 50% movement speed for 20 sec. This effect also provides immunity to being pushed by Gale Force.

abilities.name: Overpowering Gust
abilities.description: Crawth faces a random player and flaps her wings, inflicting 254477 Nature damage and knocking back all players in front of her. In the NPC Abilities category.

abilities.name: Deafening Screech
abilities.description: Crawth releases a loud screech, causing a sonic eruption at all player locations, inflicting 61014 Nature damage and additional 20338 Nature damage every 1 sec for 8 sec to all players within 4 yards of each location.This effect interrupts spell casts and also silences any player interrupted in this manner for 6 sec.

abilities.name: Goal of the Searing Blaze
abilities.description: Scoring 3 points in the Goal of the Searing Blaze triggers a Firestorm. In the NPC Abilities category. A spell from World of Warcraft: Dragonflight.

abilities.name: Blistering Fire
abilities.description: Fire emits searing heat that inflicts 17796 Fire damage every 2 sec to all players. In the NPC Abilities category. A spell from World of Warcraft: Midnight.

abilities.name: Blistering Fire
abilities.description: Fire emits searing heat that inflicts 17796 Fire damage every 2 sec to all players. In the NPC Abilities category. A spell from World of Warcraft: Midnight.

abilities.name: Goal of the Rushing Winds
abilities.description: Scoring 3 points in the Goal of the Rushing Winds triggers Gale Force. In the NPC Abilities category. A spell from World of Warcraft: Dragonflight.

abilities.name: Roving Cyclone
abilities.description: Creates cyclones that move around, inflicting 127113 Nature damage and knocking back any player it contacts. In the NPC Abilities category. A spell.

abilities.name: Roving Cyclone

abilities.name: Ruinous Winds

encounters.name: Echo of Doragosa
encounters.description: The Echo of Doragosa assaults her enemies with powerful Arcane attacks, applying [Overwhelming Power] and creating [Arcane Rifts]. In the NPCs category.

abilities.name: Overwhelming Power
abilities.description: The Echo of Doragosa's arcane attacks leave wild energy on players they hit, inflicting 15254 Arcane damage every 1 sec and increasing their Haste 5%. This effect stacks.At 3 applications, this effect erupts into an Arcane Rift.

abilities.name: Arcane Rift

abilities.name: Astral Blast
abilities.description: The Echo of Doragosa blasts the target player with powerful arcane energy, inflicting 152535 Arcane damage and applying Overwhelming Power. A spell.

abilities.name: Uncontrolled Energy
abilities.description: Wild Magic explodes on contact with a player, inflicting 127113 Arcane damage to players within 4 yds.Applies Overwhelming Power to all targets struck.

abilities.name: Energy Eruption

abilities.name: Unleash Energy

abilities.name: Astral Blast
abilities.description: The Echo of Doragosa blasts the target player with powerful arcane energy, inflicting 152535 Arcane damage and applying Overwhelming Power. A spell.

abilities.name: Power Vacuum
abilities.description: The Echo of Doragosa pulls all players to her location, then strikes with explosive energy inflicting 203326 Arcane damage and knocking back all players within 20 yards.Applies Overwhelming Power to anyone hit.

abilities.name: Power Vacuum

abilities.name: Arcane Missiles
abilities.description: The Echo of Doragosa inflicts 50831 Arcane damage to a player.Applies Overwhelming Power to the target. In the NPC Abilities category. A spell.

abilities.name: Arcane Missiles

abilities.name: Energy Bomb
abilities.description: The Echo of Doragosa marks random players with arcane energy for 6 sec.  When the Energy Bomb expires, it inflicts 61014 Arcane damage to all players within 8 yards.Applies Overwhelming Power to the target.

abilities.name: Energy Bomb
abilities.description: The Echo of Doragosa marks a player arcane energy for 6 sec.  When the Energy Bomb expires, it inflicts 61014 Arcane damage to all players within 8 yards.

encounters.name: the hoardmonger
encounters.description: The Hoardmonger prevents his reserves from being pilfered at all costs, casting [Resourceful Measures] upon reaching 90%, 60%, and 30% health, empowering one of his abilities.Upon reaching 100 energy, he tosses [Spoiled Supplies] throughout the arena, growing Rotten Mushrooms for 12 seconds. Upon contact, these apply [Toxic Spores] destroying the fungi, preventing [Putrid Burst].

abilities.name: Resourceful Measures
abilities.description: The Hoardmonger gathers from the nearest pile of resources, replacing one of his abilities with a new one.[][He can only retain one ability at a time.]

abilities.name: Spoiled Supplies
abilities.description: The Hoardmonger reaches into his sack and tosses rotten food over 7 sec, impacting targeted players for 50845 Nature damage or littering Rotten Mushrooms around the arena.

abilities.name: Toxic Spores
abilities.description: Rotten Mushrooms apply a noxious cloud, inflicting 5085 Nature damage every 2 sec for 12 sec. This effect stacks. In the NPC Abilities category.

abilities.name: Putrid Burst
abilities.description: After 12 sec the mushroom bursts, inflicting 76268 Nature damage, applying Toxic Spores to all players. In the NPC Abilities category. A spell.

abilities.name: Earthshatter Slam
abilities.description: The Hoardmonger slams the ground, inflicting 254226 Nature damage to players in a frontal cone. In the NPC Abilities category. A spell from World of Warcraft: Midnight.

abilities.name: Bonespike Slam
abilities.description: Gathering from his pile of bones, the Hoardmonger unlocks Bonespike Slam.The Hoardmonger slams the ground, inflicting 254226 Nature damage to players in a frontal cone. This additionally creates bone spikes for 45 sec which apply Bonespiked upon contact.

abilities.name: Ravenous Bellow
abilities.description: The Hoardmonger lets out a mighty roar, inflicting 86437 Physical damage to all players. Ignores armor. In the NPC Abilities category. A spell.

abilities.name: Hearty Bellow
abilities.description: Gathering from his pile of meat, the Hoardmonger unlocks Hearty Bellow.The Hoardmonger lets out a mighty roar, inflicting 86437 Physical damage to all players and an additional 15254 Physical damage every 1 sec for 8 sec. Ignores armor.

abilities.name: Overflowing Supplies
abilities.description: Gathering from his pile of mushrooms, the Hoardmonger gains Overflowing Supplies.This effect increases the amount of Rotten Mushrooms thrown during Spoiled Supplies.

abilities.name: Bonespiked
abilities.description: Broken bones litter the ground, inflicting 10169 Physical damage every 0.5 sec and reducing movement speed by 50%. In the NPC Abilities category.

encounters.name: nalorakk
encounters.description: The Loa of War spares no mortal as the final trial, assailing players with [Echoing Maul] and pushing them with [Forceful Roar].At 100 energy, Nalorakk casts [Fury of the War God], slamming Zul'jarra across the arena and incapacitating her with [Concussive Shock]. Nalorakk commands Echoes of Nalorakk to charge the defenseless Zul'jarra, casting [Echoing Fury] when colliding with the first target they encounter.

abilities.name: Echoing Maul
abilities.description: Nalorakk marks players for 4 sec, then sends an Echo of Nalorakk to their position. All Echoes of Nalorakk immediately inflict 101690 Nature damage to players within 8 yards.

abilities.name: Forceful Roar
abilities.description: Nalorakk's shout resonates throughout the den, inflicting 91521 Physical damage and pushes away players for 3 sec. Ignores armor. In the NPC Abilities category.

abilities.name: Fury of the War God
abilities.description: Nalorakk headbutts Zul'jarra into a Concussive Shock, then commands the Echoes of Nalorakk to charge her position. These collide with the first target encountered casting Echoing Fury.Any Echo of Nalorakk that reaches Zul'jarra triggers Demoralizing Scream. Each Echo remains for one additional Fury of the War God, then vanishes.

abilities.name: Concussive Shock
abilities.description: Nalorakk disables Zul'jarra with a hefty blow. Unable to defend herself, she stands vulnerable to Nalorakk's echoes. In the NPC Abilities category.

abilities.name: Echoing Fury
abilities.description: The charging Echo of Nalorakk ravages the first target in their path, inflicting 50845 Nature damage. In the NPC Abilities category. A spell.

abilities.name: Overwhelming Onslaught
abilities.description: Nalorakk swipes repeatedly, obliterating his primary target for 4 sec, inflicting 203380 Physical damage every 1 sec and increasing Overwhelming Onslaught damage taken by 50% for 5 sec. This effect stacks.

abilities.name: Defensive Stance
abilities.description: When Nalorakk casts Overwhelming Onslaught, Zul'jarra creates a protective barrier reducing damage taken from Overwhelming Onslaught by 50% to players behind her.

abilities.name: Demoralizing Scream
abilities.description: Zul'jarra cries out in pain from the undefended attack, inflicting 76268 Physical damage to all players. Ignores armor.Players feel the weight of her burden, increasing damage taken by 10% for 30 sec. This effect stacks.

abilities.name: Echoing Maul
abilities.description: Nalorakk marks players for 4 sec, then sends an Echo of Nalorakk to their position. All Echoes of Nalorakk immediately inflict 101690 Nature damage to players within 8 yards.

abilities.name: Spectral Slash
abilities.description: The echo slashes at nearby players, knocking them back and causing them to bleed for 15254 Physical damage every 2 sec for 20 sec. This effect stacks.

abilities.name: Overwhelming Onslaught

encounters.name: sentinel of winter
encounters.description: The Sentinel of Winter harnesses the power of the surrounding blizzard. This forms [Raging Squalls] which wander the landscape, and Fractured Shivercores which cast [Winter's Shroud] until defeated.At 100 energy he coalesces a massive storm and channels [Eternal Winter] absorbing incoming damage, inflicting heavy damage, and pushing back players until broken.

abilities.name: Raging Squall

abilities.name: Snowdrift

abilities.name: Rimeshatter

encounters.name: Degentrius
encounters.description: Degentrius leads the assault from atop Magisters' Terrace, commanding the platform with overwhelming Void magic. [Void Torrent] streams carve across the arena as they flow into Degentrius, while [Unstable Void Essence]s ricochet around the platform.

encounters.name: Muro'jin and Nekraxx
encounters.description: The cunning duo of Muro'jin and Nekraxx fight as one, assailing players with an array of combined tactics.Muro'jin withers players down with [Barrage] while Nekraxx flings a salvo of feathers with [Fetid Quillstorm].As Muro'jin scatters [Freezing Traps] across the arena, Nekraxx barrels forward with [Carrion Swoop].

abilities.name: Barrage

abilities.name: Fetid Quillstorm
